name: Mustard Pecan Chicken
recipeIngredient: Half chicken breasts (skinless and boneless), slightly flattened and patted dry
Flour -- seasoned with salt and pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. LIGHTLY DREDGE THE CHICKEN in the seasoned flour, patting to remove any excess.
2. Brush one side of each breast generously with mustard.
3. Pat the pecans into the mustard.
4. Turn and repeat on the other side.
5. Place the chicken in a flat dish, cover, and refrigerate for 20 minutes.
6. In a large heavy skillet, heat the butter and oil just until the butter foams.
7. Add the chicken breasts and saute them over medium-high heat until the pecans are lightly browned, about 3 minutes.
8. Turn and cook the second side for an additional 2 minutes.
9. Remove at once.
